chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 270 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْحِنَّاءُ عَلَى أَثَرِ اَلنُّورَةِ أَمَانٌ مِنَ اَلْجُذَامِ وَ اَلْبَرَصِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.270 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Applying henna after the use of Nuura (depilatory paste) is a protection against leprosy and vitiligo."
